'''Elspeth Strobestock''' was the wife of [[Sir/Legends|Sir]] [[Heron Strobestock|Heron]] of [[House Barnaba]] who was a colonel in the [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]]. Prior to the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|battle of Hoth]] Elspeth was a beautiful middle-aged women with styled, long, honey-blonde hair.<ref name="LOTE" />

She was a popular guest at social functions as she was a great storyteller and an outrageous flirt, always more popular with the men than the women. As a rising star in the [[New Order/Legends|New Order]], her husband was often away on business in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. [[Sir/Legends|Dame]] Elspeth always made a great effort to show that she missed Heron but her misery seemed to vanish when she was comforted by a man's attention.<ref name="LOTE" />
